summary: First testing iteration after MVP implementation. Backend: 17/17 tests passing (100%). Frontend: All UI tests passing. AI integration (OpenAI GPT-5.2) working correctly for clothing analysis and outfit generation.

minor.issue: Logger definition at line 512 should be moved to top of file (after imports) - currently defined after functions that use it. Works in practice but is bad code structure.

issues: Input placeholder text contrast could be improved (current: gray on dark background)

ai_features_tested: Clothing attribute detection (category, color, texture, style) via GPT-5.2

action_items: Consider moving logger definition to top of server.py (lines 511-512) for better code structure
critical_code_review_comments: Backend code quality: Excellent - proper Pydantic validation, error handling, MongoDB _id exclusion
Frontend code quality: Excellent - all testID attributes present, React Native components used correctly, StyleSheet.create() for all styles
AI Integration: Working correctly with emergentintegrations library and EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
Security: JWT and bcrypt properly implemented, token expiry set to 168 hours
Mobile-first design: All screens use proper mobile viewport, touch targets appear adequate, 8pt grid spacing visible
Logger defined at line 512 but used in functions at lines 131, 158, 209, 233 - works because functions execute after module load, but should be moved to top
seed_data_creation: Test users created during pytest execution. Test user test@example.com with password test123456 now exists in database for future testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MVP is fully functional. All backend APIs working. All frontend screens rendering correctly. AI integration (OpenAI GPT-5.2) tested and working. Test user test@example.com / test123456 exists. Only minor code quality issue with logger definition location (non-functional). Future testing should focus on: image upload flow end-to-end, outfit generation with multiple items, recommendations API with wardrobe data, saved outfits functionality.
